inputs.label: List Price
inputs.businessContext: The original price before any discounts or taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: The original price before any discounts or taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirim veya vergilerden önceki orijinal fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der ursprüngliche Preis vor Abzügen oder Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix d'origine avant remises ou taxes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El precio original antes de descuentos o impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر الأصلي قبل أي خصومات أو ضرائب.

inputs.label: Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage discount applied to the list price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage discount applied to the list price.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de remise appliqué au prix de vente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de descuento aplicado al precio de lista.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الخصم المطبقة على سعر القائمة.

inputs.label: VAT (%)
inputs.businessContext: Value Added Tax percentage applied to the discounted price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value Added Tax percentage applied to the discounted price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimli fiyata uygulanan Katma Değer Vergisi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mehrwertsteuer-Prozentsatz, angewendet auf den rabattierten Preis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe sur la valeur ajoutée appliqué au prix remisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de IVA aplicado al precio con descuento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة القيمة المضافة المطبقة على السعر بعد الخصم.

inputs.label: Extra Charges
inputs.businessContext: Any additional fixed charges (e.g., shipping, handling) added before tax.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any additional fixed charges (e.g., shipping, handling) added before tax.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergiden önce eklenen sabit ücretler (örn. nakliye, işlem ücreti).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Fixkosten (z. B. Versand, Bearbeitung), die vor Steuern hinzugefügt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes additionnels (p. ex., expédition, manutention) ajoutés avant la taxe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargos fijos adicionales (ej. envío, manipulación) añadidos antes de impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي رسوم إضافية ثابتة (مثل الشحن والمناولة) تضاف قبل الضريبة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
